title: The Big One — Beta Server
changes: --- MOB BALANCE ---
Dimension scaling: Overworld 1x, Nether 1.5x HP/1.25x DMG, End 2x/1.5x, Twilight Forest 2.5x/2x, Undergarden 1.75x/1.5x
Vanilla hostile spawns un-nerfed: zombie 95, skeleton 100, spider 100, creeper 100 (were 30-40)
Spawn distance: minimum 40 blocks from player (was 8 — way too close)
ServerCore mob cap raised to 120% with 60% floor
Iron Golem rebalanced: 750HP (was 1000), 18 armor (was 20), 4x speed (was 6x)
--- MINECOLONIES ---
Max citizens: 300 (was 250)
Raid difficulty: 10/10 (was 8), up to 150 raiders per wave (was 100)
Raids every 5-7 nights (was 7-10)
Raiders can break doors now
Guard health/damage multiplier: 10x (was 15x — slightly dialed back)
--- EMC ECONOMY ---
25% transmutation tax on all EMC burning (covalenceLoss = 0.75)
NeoEssentials currency renamed to EMC, starting balance 1000
/sacrifice command: offer EMC to MadGod for tiered rewards (1K to 5M+ EMC)
logFoundExploits enabled — server logs any EMC generation exploits on boot
--- PERMISSIONS ---
Player commands: /home (max 3, 30s cooldown), /tpa, /back (on death), /spawn (60s cooldown), /warp (use only)
Dangerous commands double-blocked: /time and similar restricted to OP only
/home cooldown raised: 5s → 30s, /spawn: 5s → 60s
--- PERFORMANCE ---
10G heap (was 8G), G1HeapRegionSize 16M for large heaps
ServerCore target MSPT: 35ms (was 40ms)
Auto-clear rain every 5 minutes via KubeJS (no more constant rain)
--- LOOT TABLES ---
Iron's Spells scrolls in dungeon/nether/end chests (common to legendary tier)
Occultism items in nether fortress and dungeon chests
Forbidden & Arcanus stellarite and dragon scales in end cities
Malum materials in bastion remnants
Spellbooks and dictionaries in stronghold libraries
--- NEW SYSTEMS ---
/link command: generates a clickable URL to link your Minecraft account to the website
/tzptest: automated crash testing harness (blocks, items, entities, stress test)
Crash test arena builder at /tzparena
